pr_text:
## Title: Fix race condition in MAC stats telnet command affecting HARQ process state

### Summary
The `measurcmd_display_macstats_ue` telnet command was reading UE MAC statistics without proper synchronization, causing race conditions with the MAC layer's HARQ process updates. When the telnet server accessed `UE_info` and `eNB_UE_STATS` structures while they were being modified by the scheduler, it could observe inconsistent HARQ state information. This manifested downstream as incorrect retran
